calendar.matters:
HEARING ON PETITION TO CHANGE THE NAME OF THE MINOR, KENNETH ULYSES PINTO CANTO


Off Calendar Dec-13-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: The matter came on for Change of name of Minor Kenneth Ulyses Pinto Canto.

Dept.505; Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: N. Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:24 am. and concluding at 10:28 am.

Petitioner Iliana Particia Canto Campos appeared in pro per, was placed under oath and testified.

1st Amended Petition for change of name of minor filed September 20, 2024.

1st Amended Order to show cause filed September 20, 2024.

Notice of hearing filed November 07, 2024.

Proof of Publication filed December 12, 2024.

The Court addresses the petitioner.

The Petitioner provides testimony.

After reviewing the petition, hearing the testimony and there are no objections filed, The Court grants Petitioner's request for change of name of Minor.

Request Pending to Waive Court Fees and Costs Pursuant to G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, and 8.818
Off Calendar Feb-16-2022 Text Ruling
